scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send:
INVITE sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port];transport=[transport] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 127.0.0.2:15061;rport=34485;ibmsid=local.1535720411753_5635160_5652512;branch=z9hG4bK90714407181009 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 127.0.0.2:15061;rport;ibmsid=local.1535720411753_5635159_5652511;branch=z9hG4bK875007558535803 Via: SIP/2.0/TLS 192.168.25.6;branch=z9hG4bKafdb47f0d75c41e8b91505056a2e428-AP;ft=1965;received=192.168.25.6;rport=19196 From: sip:[field0]@[local_ip];tag=[call_number] To: sip:[field1]@[remote_ip]:[remote_port] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 INVITE Contact: <sip:192.168.25.6:5061;transport=[transport]> Record-Route: <sip:[local_ip]:[local_port];ipcs-line=71;transport=tls;lr> Record-Route: <sips:127.0.0.2:15061;ibmsid=local.1535720411753_5635159_5652511;lr> Record-Route: <sips:trksm1@192.168.25.6;transport=tls;;av-asset-uid=74a12fd8;lr> Record-Route: <sips:192.168.25.2;lr> Supported: replaces Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test User-to-User: 00FA080001001056965CFB;encoding=hex Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 2353687637 IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] b=TIAS:64000 t=0 0 a=avf:avc=y prio=n a=csup:avf-v0 m=audio [media_port] RTP/SAVP 0 101 a=sendrecv a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=crypto:1 AES_256_CM_HMAC_SHA1_32 inline:dRUAwS/uBSKS2u5N2FQd35rRiMtPgZMge3N/k24Xa5odDmHycWHwkbB2zGPgnA==
